name: Stuffed Tomatoes a La Riviera
recipeIngredient: 1 cup King Crab Meat, rinsed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Set tomato on stem-end.
2. Cut almost through into 6 sections.
3. Combine crab, sour cream, cheese and dressing blend; mix well.
4. Spread the cut tomatoes and carefully insert avocado wedges in the spaces of each tomato.
5. Fill centers with crab meat.
6. Serve on Bibb or Boston lettuce.
7. Serves 4
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV
ed. 1974
